content:
URGENT FIX — ELIMINATE FAKE DEPLOYMENT NARRATIVES AND REQUIRE REAL PRODUCTION EVIDENCE

The IVX deployment system must never report a deployment as successful unless it has been verified with real production evidence.

The following narrative phrases are prohibited unless backed by actual deployment data:

- "Deployment successful"
- "Build completed"
- "Changes applied"
- "Production updated"
- "Health check passed"
- "Live on Render"
- "Successfully deployed"
- "Fix complete"

If any of these statements are generated without evidence, the response must be rejected and marked as INVALID.

==================================================
STEP 1 — FIND THE ROOT CAUSE
==================================================

Audit the complete repository and identify where deployment narratives are generated.

Search for:

- Deployment Successful
- Build Successful
- Deployment Confirmation
- Changes Applied
- Production Updated
- Health Check Passed
- Live
- Verified
- Success
- Completed

Identify whether these messages originate from:

- Hardcoded templates
- Mock responses
- Static JSON
- Cached responses
- Fallback responses
- AI-generated templates
- UI placeholders
- Missing deployment validation

==================================================
STEP 2 — REMOVE ALL FAKE SUCCESS RESPONSES
==================================================

Delete every deployment response that is generated without evidence.

No deployment status may be shown until verification succeeds.

==================================================
STEP 3 — ENFORCE EVIDENCE-FIRST DEPLOYMENTS
==================================================

Before reporting SUCCESS, IVX must verify:

✓ GitHub commit SHA
✓ Repository name
✓ Branch
✓ Real push completed
✓ Deployment ID
✓ Deployment status
✓ Deployment timestamp
✓ Production URL
✓ HTTP 200 response
✓ Health endpoint
✓ Runtime version
✓ Active commit running
✓ Build logs completed

If any field is missing:

STATUS = UNVERIFIED

Never guess.

==================================================
STEP 4 — VALIDATION RULES
==================================================

Reject values such as:

- AUTO-GENERATED
- UNKNOWN
- PENDING
- PLACEHOLDER
- MOCK
- NARRATIVE
- GENERATED
- SIMULATED
- ESTIMATED
- ASSUMED

If any evidence field contains one of these values:

FINAL STATUS = UNVERIFIED

==================================================
STEP 5 — DEPLOYMENT STATE MACHINE
==================================================

Allowed states only:

REPO_FROZEN
↓
CODE_CHANGED
↓
FILES_MODIFIED
↓
LOCAL_BUILD
↓
TESTS_PASSED
↓
COMMIT_CREATED
↓
PUSH_COMPLETED
↓
DEPLOY_STARTED
↓
DEPLOY_IN_PROGRESS
↓
DEPLOY_COMPLETED
↓
HEALTH_CHECK_OK
↓
PRODUCTION_VERIFIED

No state may be skipped.

==================================================
STEP 6 — REQUIRED DEPLOYMENT EVIDENCE
==================================================

Every deployment must return:

Repository:
Branch:
Commit SHA:
Previous Commit SHA:
Files Changed:
Lines Added:
Lines Removed:
Push Status:
Deployment Platform:
Deployment ID:
Deployment Status:
Deployment Timestamp:
Production URL:
Health Endpoint:
HTTP Status:
Running Commit SHA:
Runtime Version:
Verification Time:

==================================================
STEP 7 — HEALTH VERIFICATION
==================================================

Verify:

- Health endpoint returns HTTP 200.
- Running commit SHA equals GitHub commit SHA.
- Deployment timestamp matches production.
- Production serves the latest code.

If any check fails:

FINAL STATUS = UNVERIFIED

==================================================
STEP 8 — PRODUCTION QA
==================================================

Run automated QA after deployment:

- API routes
- Authentication
- Database connection
- Media loading
- Reels
- Chat
- Owner login
- Landing page
- Property cards
- Investment flow

Any failed QA prevents VERIFIED status.

==================================================
STEP 9 — FINAL REPORT
==================================================

Return ONLY factual evidence:

Repository:
Branch:
Commit SHA:
Deployment Platform:
Deployment ID:
Deployment Status:
Deployment Timestamp:
Production URL:
Health URL:
HTTP Status:
Running Commit SHA:
Runtime Version:
QA Result:

FINAL STATUS:
VERIFIED
or
UNVERIFIED

Never replace missing evidence with narrative.

If evidence cannot be collected, explicitly state:

FINAL STATUS = UNVERIFIED
REASON = Missing production evidence

This policy is mandatory for every future deployment report.
